MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay ; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Hui Qiang Zhou is present. Represented by
Attorney Aaron Farmer appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Diana West is present.
Attorney Carla Vasques representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Nov-26-2012 is vacated. (D501)
